raw.message: Like son, like father. Roblox inspires families to create worlds together.

hook.summary: A young boy introduces his custom-made Roblox game.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a child speaking, intercut with shots of hands using a mouse and digital effects.
hook.text_overlay: I'm making a Roblox game called Fist Fight Beta.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I'm making a Roblox game called Fist Fight Beta.

scene_flow: Introduction of a young developer and his game 'Fist Fight Beta'.
Gameplay footage showing chaotic combat and physics-based action.
The creator explains the simple, fun-focused mechanics of the game.
A father figure describes the ease and spontaneity of creating on the platform.
Closing logo reveal with the call to action 'make it yourself'.
on_screen_text: It's a cluster of action and bodies flying everywhere.
There's no real story to it.
and he'll just start creating something.
audience_proxy: Parents and children interested in game creation and creative play.
